overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a neon-lit downtown district. The player character crosses streets, traverses a covered arcade with vibrant pink neon lighting, and explores an open plaza before arriving at a street-level bar.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street with crosswalk and construction barricades

events.description: futuristic sedan drives past on the street ahead
turns right at the corner to approach the pedestrian crosswalk
begins crossing the street at the yellow striped crosswalk

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk past barricades, then turning right and crossing the street at the crosswalk

notable_agents.action: futuristic black sedan driving along the street
child in pink jacket walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: temporary traffic barriers with alternating yellow and black stripes blocking the road
large vertical illuminated advertisement for VIOLA on the building facade
building decorated with large tropical palm tree mural and pink neon accents
broad yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing lines

segments.scene_description: The segment begins near construction barricades on an urban street at night, with a large VIOLA billboard visible on a distant building. The player turns right and crosses the street at a marked crosswalk while a futuristic sedan passes by. Sparse pedestrians are visible on the sidewalks.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian arcade with intense pink and yellow neon lighting

events.description: enters covered walkway with intense pink neon illumination
approaching the end of the covered corridor, bright light visible ahead

agents.ego_description: walking through a covered corridor illuminated by vibrant pink and yellow neon lights

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with red hair and white backpack walking ahead into the corridor

entered.detail: structural beams and frames glowing with bright magenta pink neon light
horizontal yellow fluorescent tube lights running along the ceiling
wall with illuminated posters and vending machine displays

segments.scene_description: The player enters a covered pedestrian arcade bathed in intense pink and yellow neon light. The corridor features glowing structural arches and illuminated advertising displays on the walls. Other pedestrians walk ahead through the tunnel-like space toward the bright exit visible at the far end.

scene_state.functional_zone: open pedestrian plaza with palm trees and benches between skyscrapers

events.description: exits covered arcade into open plaza with palm trees and seating areas
slight turn to the right while continuing forward through the plaza

agents.ego_description: walking through an open plaza area with palm trees and benches, observing the surrounding neon advertisements and skyscrapers

notable_agents.action: person sitting on a concrete bench near the walkway

entered.detail: tall palm trees in concrete planters lining the pedestrian walkway
modern concrete seating areas with yellow accents where pedestrians rest
glowing cyan light strips embedded in the pavement marking pathways
large glowing digital advertisements and brand displays on building facades

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered walkway, the scene opens into a spacious pedestrian plaza with palm trees and concrete benches. The area features glowing cyan light strips on the ground and massive holographic billboards on the surrounding skyscrapers. Pedestrians stroll through the open space as the player moves toward a distant bar.

scene_state.functional_zone: street-level bar with outdoor seating and tropical planters

events.description: approaching the CIRKUS bar storefront with outdoor seating
slowing down and stopping near the bar entrance

agents.ego_description: approaching the CIRKUS bar and observing the outdoor seating area where two patrons are conversing and drinking

notable_agents.action: man in yellow jacket drinking a beverage near the bar entrance
woman with hat drinking and conversing with the man

entered.detail: blue and red illuminated signage for CIRKUS COLD bar above the entrance
large rectangular concrete planters with lush tropical plants
outdoor service counter with stools and yellow trim

segments.scene_description: The player approaches the CIRKUS bar, a street-level establishment with prominent blue and red signage and outdoor seating surrounded by tropical planters. Two patrons stand near the entrance drinking and conversing. The surrounding area features tall skyscrapers with the bright sky visible between them.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a neon-drenched urban district, moving from a gritty street corner into a vibrant arcade and finally into an open city plaza. It begins near construction barricades under the glow of a distant VIOLA billboard, crossing a marked street as a futuristic sedan glides past. As the camera moves forward, the open street transitions into a covered pedestrian arcade bathed in intense pink and yellow neon light, where glowing arches and advertising displays line the tunnel-like corridor. The scene then expands upon exiting the walkway into a spacious pedestrian plaza featuring cyan light strips on the ground, palm trees, and massive holographic billboards towering overhead. Finally, the camera approaches the CIRKUS bar, shifting focus toward the establishment's blue and red signage and outdoor seating area nestled beneath the surrounding skyscrapers.
